subcodes.first_line: O friends of the Beloved! The fragrance of life wafteth towards the souls, even the holy breathings from the gardens of the Abhá Kingdom [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دوستان جانان بوی جانی سوی جانها میوزد یعنی از ریاض ملکوت ابهی نفحات قدس
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
